findings.message: The `widgetizer` runtime service is defined only in `dev.yml` (scoped to the `dev` profile). Per Taskfile.yml, only dev and dev:lite compose `dev.yml`; staging/prod compose `<env>.yml` + services.yml + observability.yml (per infra/deploy/strategy.sh), which do NOT include `dev.yml`. As a result this prebuilt application service (image ghcr.io/acme/widgetizer:1.4.0, wired to the app database) reaches dev but is silently absent from staging/prod. It is not local-developer-experience tooling (not TLS termination, a mail catcher, or a DB admin UI), so the dev-only home is a parity defect.
findings.suggestion: Move the `widgetizer` service definition to `infra/compose/services.yml` (the battery service overlay staging/prod compose) or to the deployed `staging.yml`/`prod.yml` overlays so it reaches every deployed environment. If it is intentionally dev-only, record that opt-out in the decisions log rather than leaving it silently omitted from staging/prod.
